description_long: This is a modern stealth fighter jet with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The fuselage is compact and streamlined, with sharply swept wings and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The cockpit canopy is tinted and positioned forward, providing a clear view for the pilot. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel at the front. The engine exhaust is visible at the rear, and the overall body appears to be constructed from advanced composite materials. The jet has no visible external weaponry or hardpoints, emphasizing its stealth profile.
description: A matte black stealth fighter jet with angular wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a tinted cockpit canopy. The landing gear is deployed and the body is streamlined for minimal radar signature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, tinted cockpit canopy, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, deployed landing gear, and angular wing profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, sharply swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the fuselage and landing gear.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to have integrated armor with smooth, sloped surfaces; no distinct modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: solid matte black color; no camouflage pattern visible
